hooks.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -q '\.go$'; then gofmt -w "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi
filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then rustfmt "$filepath" 2>/dev/null; fi

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '(\.env|credentials|secrets|\.secret|private_key|crypto/wasm/pkg/)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Protected file — do not edit directly. Contains sensitive data or is auto-generated.' >&2; exit 2; fi

filepath="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -qE '(package-lock\.json|yarn\.lock|pnpm-lock\.yaml|go\.sum|Cargo\.lock)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Lock file — do not edit manually. Use package manager commands instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi
echo '[HOOK] Task group complete. Consider running /simplify to review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency.'
